backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the hover-triggered bite animation feature for the SVG smiley face mouth in App.tsx, with high confidence and a reference to test ID REQ-5.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON blob containing one-line summaries of the three main frontend source files: App.tsx, index.css, and tailwind.config.js.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Smiley Face', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering an interactive SVG smiley face with mouse-tracking pupils, blink animation, and a three-state interactive mouth ('smile', 'open', 'bitten') that triggers a bite animation on hover.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider managing Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles for the smiley face app, establishing a dark warm background with radial gradient, OKLCH color tokens, SVG glow effects, and footer layout styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom face/gold color tokens, serif font families, glow box shadows, and standard shadcn/ui OKLCH token mappings.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and feature history for an interactive SVG smiley face app, including features like mouse-tracking pupils, blinking animation, dark theme, and a mouth bite animation triggered by hover.
